inner-loop.note: Dispatching per-story inner coding loop (branch-setup through branch-complete). Sequencing constraint: A1 (staging-safe auth stub) has no upstream dependency and blocks everything else in both epics (A2-A5 depend on it directly or transitively; B1 depends on it; B3 depends on A1+A3). Dispatch order: A1 first (solo, nothing else can start until it merges), then A2 and B1 can start in parallel once A1 is merged (B1 was deliberately made independent of A3 at /review to avoid spec run-order coupling), then A3 after A2, then A4 after A3, then A5 after A1-A4 all merged, then B2 after A5+B1 merged, then B3 after A1+A3 merged (can run parallel to A4/A5 once A3 is in).
